bannerText: Try premium discovery for one focused month with priority visibility and verified contact unlocks.
assistiveContent: Useful when a family is already shortlisting and wants faster introductions.

packages.pkgBenefit: Unlock verified phone numbers, send unlimited interests, and appear higher in search for one focused month.
packages.linearContent: Best for members who already have a shortlist and want to move quickly.
packages.assistiveContent: Pair this with saved searches to quickly follow up on recently active matches.

packages.pkgBenefit: Adds extra contact views, profile highlight, and assisted introduction prompts for a sharper one-month push.
packages.linearContent: A balanced short-term plan for families comparing several prospects at once.
packages.assistiveContent: Recommended when response speed matters more than a long membership window.

bannerText: Three months gives enough time to shortlist, speak, and involve both families without rushing.
assistiveContent: A balanced duration for members who want consistent discovery and family review time.

packages.pkgBenefit: A dependable plan with contact unlocks, unlimited interests, and recent visitor visibility across a full quarter.
packages.linearContent: Strong for steady discovery and family review cycles.
packages.assistiveContent: Good fit when families want a clear but not rushed premium window.

packages.pkgBenefit: Adds profile boost, deeper contact access, and priority placement for more serious inbound responses.
packages.linearContent: A practical upgrade when multiple family conversations are active.
packages.assistiveContent: Recommended for members who want better response quality without jumping to premium concierge.

packages.pkgBenefit: Premium placement, larger contact quota, and high-intent match alerts for a concentrated search period.
packages.linearContent: Designed for high-intent members who can evaluate matches weekly.
packages.assistiveContent: Works well when families want broader reach within a three-month timeline.

packages.pkgBenefit: An extended classic package with more contact views and weekly profile refreshes.
packages.linearContent: A middle path between Classic and Advantage.
packages.assistiveContent: Useful for members who want extra reach without advisor support.

bannerText: Six months supports a deeper search across cities, communities, and family availability.
assistiveContent: A longer window for members comparing matches across cities, communities, and family schedules.

packages.pkgBenefit: Longer access to verified contacts, unlimited interests, and profile visitor insights for a measured search.
packages.linearContent: Best when the family is searching across regions or communities.
packages.assistiveContent: A calm runway for members who prefer thoughtful conversations over quick filtering.

packages.pkgBenefit: Adds stronger visibility, extra contact access, and preference-based alerts over six months.
packages.linearContent: The flexible plan for families comparing multiple serious prospects.
packages.assistiveContent: Recommended when response coverage and search duration both matter.

packages.pkgBenefit: Premium placement, larger contact quota, and high-intent match alerts across a six-month search.
packages.linearContent: Built for members who want broad access without concierge handholding.
packages.assistiveContent: Good for family-led searches where several decision makers review matches.

packages.pkgBenefit: A larger premium contact pool with profile refreshes, match alerts, and shortlist export support.
packages.linearContent: For members who expect sustained search volume.
packages.assistiveContent: A high-coverage package for families evaluating a larger prospect set.

bannerTitle: Support until the search is done
bannerText: Extended access and services for families who want steady help until marriage is finalized.
assistiveContent: Designed for families who want extended search support without watching the calendar closely.

packages.pkgBenefit: One year of contact access, unlimited interests, and monthly profile refreshes.
packages.linearContent: A long runway for families who prefer patient discovery.
packages.assistiveContent: Useful when families want time to evaluate across locations and communities.

packages.pkgBenefit: Adds priority search placement, more contact access, and preference match alerts for a full year.
packages.linearContent: A strong long-term plan for families handling the search themselves.
packages.assistiveContent: Recommended when families want sustained visibility across the year.

packages.pkgBenefit: Premium placement, large contact quota, and assisted shortlist check-ins until the search matures.
packages.linearContent: High coverage for committed families who want durable premium access.
packages.assistiveContent: Works well for high-involvement family searches.

packages.pkgBenefit: Includes assisted profile review, match curation calls, and premium access through the year.
packages.linearContent: A service-heavy package for families who want active guidance.
packages.assistiveContent: Helpful when parents or relatives want structured support.

packages.pkgBenefit: Signature support with premium placement, high contact quota, and guided family introduction planning.
packages.linearContent: Designed for families who want maximum service depth.
packages.assistiveContent: Best when several family stakeholders need coordination.

bannerText: Personalized plans add relationship manager support, curated matches, and follow-up discipline.
assistiveContent: Best for families who want a relationship manager to bring discipline and context to the search.

packages.pkgBenefit: Relationship manager support, curated weekly matches, and assisted follow-ups for three months.
packages.linearContent: Best for members who want guided matching but still make final decisions.
packages.assistiveContent: Good fit when families need help staying consistent.

packages.pkgBenefit: Six months of guided search, curation, profile optimization, and introduction planning.
packages.linearContent: Balanced duration and assistance for serious family-led decisions.
packages.assistiveContent: Recommended for families that want a structured but flexible search.

packages.pkgBenefit: Higher-touch support with deeper curation, family alignment notes, and priority manager availability.
packages.linearContent: For members who want more hands-on search operations.
packages.assistiveContent: Useful when the search needs nuanced family preference handling.

bannerText: Elite is for high-touch matchmaking with deeply curated prospects and confidential handling.
assistiveContent: Ideal when discretion, deep curation, and fewer high-quality introductions matter most.

packages.pkgBenefit: White-glove manager support, confidential match discovery, family preference interviews, and premium introduction planning.
packages.linearContent: A discreet high-touch experience for families expecting deep curation.
packages.assistiveContent: Best for families who prefer fewer but deeply vetted introductions.

bannerText: Twin pack supports families managing premium search for siblings or close family members together.
assistiveContent: Useful when one family is coordinating premium discovery for two members at the same time.

packages.pkgBenefit: Premium access for two coordinated profiles with shared contact planning and shortlist notes.
packages.linearContent: Good when siblings are starting premium search at the same time.
packages.assistiveContent: Keeps family conversations organized across two searches.

packages.pkgBenefit: Longer coordinated premium access for two profiles with boosts and preference alerts.
packages.linearContent: Balanced duration and reach for two parallel family searches.
packages.assistiveContent: Recommended when both profiles need a steady six-month search window.

packages.pkgBenefit: Premium coordinated support for two profiles with larger contact pool and family summary notes.
packages.linearContent: For families handling two high-intent searches with more premium access.
packages.assistiveContent: Good for families who want both searches to receive similar attention.
